nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, “Once again they will speak this word in the land of Judah and in its cities when I restore their fortunes, ‘The Lord bless you, O abode of righteousness, O holy hill!’

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: “Once more they shall use these words in the land of Judah and in its cities, when I restore their fortunes: “‘The Lord bless you, O habitation of righteousness, O holy hill!’

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：“我使被擄的人歸回的時候，他們在猶大地，在猶大的城鎮裡，必再說這樣的話：‘公義的居所啊，聖山哪，願耶和華賜福給你！’

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说：“我使被掳的犹大人回到故乡后，他们要在犹大各城邑再次呼喊， “‘公义的居所啊， 圣山啊，愿耶和华赐福给你！’
